notes: This dataset is designed for automated benchmarking. Some questions include an optional `expected.numeric.dbPath` so the runner can score numeric accuracy using your Postgres data (Prisma).
For document-only RAG, set up official documents, run `docs:collect` + `docs:index`, then run the benchmark so citations can be verified against retrieved context.

questions.question: From the official documents, what is the Return on Equity (ROE) for NABIL? Provide the ROE value and cite the page.
What is the Earnings Per Share (EPS) for NABIL based on the official annual/quarterly report? Provide the EPS and cite the page.
What was NABIL's net profit in the latest official report available? Provide the figure and cite the page.
Summarize the key risk factors mentioned for NABIL in the official document set. Provide at least 2 citations (document + page).
What does the official document say about NABIL's revenue trend? Answer strictly from the document and cite the page(s).
